channel.title: Attachments Offloaded to AWS not working
channel.description:
Hello,
I have offloaded my site media to AWS S3 and i noticed that such featured images are not showing up in attachments although their attachment is there in post data.

item.title: Attachments Offloaded to AWS not working
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Ok, good to know, thanks

Read full topic
item.source: Attachments Offloaded to AWS not working

item.title: Attachments Offloaded to AWS not working
item.dc:creator: aeyzazkhan
item.description:
Thank you, the issue is resolved, it was related to Permissions on S3.

Read full topic
item.source: Attachments Offloaded to AWS not working

item.title: Attachments Offloaded to AWS not working
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Could you please share some info about:

  • The media response of your REST API (like this https://test.frontity.io/wp-json/wp/v2/media)
  • The complete urls of the images hosted in AWS.

Read full topic
item.source: Attachments Offloaded to AWS not working
